RICANOOOOOO MY LOVEEEEE!!!
this event is so cute and wholesome!!! i love every single part of it sm!! currently my favorite event in woofia next to wang anuberus. ricano is so cute, i love him and famido sm. and the event ending??? godddd its pure loveee between the two!! ricano is instantly one of my favorites (aside from kumoyama and yuhee). anyway, aside from the amazing story, this update is huge! new buddies in standard, anuberus rerun (which also means next update might be a limited banner), new main story chapter, more lucky poke pulls (thank fucking god). did you pull for ricano or anuberus? let me know how did it go! i managed to e5 my anuberus cus of the rerun! as usual, have fun using him!

also im going crazy with this stupid filter. guys cant have nipples apparently so i have to take them away :(((


NOTE!!
i changed his story a bit especially story 3 and 4, replacing famido with you instead. though him and famido still remain as roommates.


Arf! Tags for you~☆
